headline: Goldman Sachs Loves 3 Energy, Mining and Utility Dividend Giants in Front of Q1 Earnings
summary: Goldman Sachs is the acknowledged leader in the investment landscape on Wall Street and worldwide. The firm’s top-notch research department continues to provide institutional and high-net-worth clients with the best ideas across the investment spectrum and is likely to do so for years to come. headline: Assessing Xcel Energy (XEL) Valuation As Market Signals On Growth And Risk Look Mixed
summary: What recent performance says about Xcel Energy (XEL) Xcel Energy (XEL) has attracted attention after a mixed recent run, with a roughly 0.4% decline over the past day and a 1.5% pullback over the past week, alongside modest gains over the month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Xcel Energy. Looking beyond the latest pullback, Xcel Energy’s share price has a 5.99% year to date return, while its 1 year total shareholder return of 17.35% points to steady, income supported...
